item.title: Avian Influenza A (H5N1) – Cambodia
item.description: A case of human infection with avian influenza A(H5N1) virus was reported in Cambodia.

item.title: Mpox – Democratic Republic of the Congo
item.description: An outbreak of mpox has been reported in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

item.title: Dengue – Brazil
item.description: Increased dengue cases reported in Brazil during the 2025-2026 season.
